mapper.select: /*FathMapper.selectFathSelfTrg*/ SELECT A.EVNT_TYPE, B.RES_NO, C.FATH_MOBILE_FN || C.FATH_MOBILE_MN || C.FATH_MOBILE_RN AS SMS_RCV_TEL_NO, B.OPER_TYPE FROM NMCP_ACEN_REQ A, MCP_REQUEST B, MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR C WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.END_STATUS != 'Y' AND A.REQ_STATUS = 'N' AND B.FATH_TRG_YN = 'Y' AND B.REQUEST_STATE_CODE = '50' AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM NMCP_FATH_SELF_URL WHERE RES_NO = A.RES_NO AND EXPIR_DT > SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: /* FathMapper.insertFathSelfUrl */ INSERT INTO NMCP_FATH_SELF_URL( UUID, RES_NO, OPER_TYPE, URL, EXPIR_DT, CRET_ID, CRET_DT ) VALUES( #{uuid}, #{resNo}, #{operType}, #{url}, SYSDATE + 1, 'BATCH', SYSDATE )
